steps: Log in with your PandaDoc account (Account Owner or Admin role required)
Under the 'API' section, click 'Generate API Key' or 'Create API Key'
Enter a name for your key and select the environment (Production or Sandbox)
Click 'Generate' and copy the API key
Use the key in the Authorization header with the prefix 'API-Key'

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your PandaDoc API key for authenticating requests

notes: Only Account Owners and Admin users can access the API settings page
A free Sandbox environment is available for testing at https://app.pandadoc.com/a/#/sandbox
Use the header format: Authorization: API-Key <your_key>
Sandbox API keys and production API keys are separate
PandaDoc plans start at $19/month; API access may require a Business plan or higher

test_endpoint.description: List all documents in your PandaDoc account
